name: Messari API
what_it_does: Crypto asset data and research API providing asset metrics (price, volume, market cap, supply), DeFi protocol data (TVL, revenue, fees), fundraising data, and qualitative research via structured REST API. Targets institutional-grade data consumers. Messari is known for standardized cross-protocol metrics that enable apples-to-apples comparisons.
use_cases: Fetch standardized asset metrics (market cap, price, volume, circulating supply) for any major crypto asset for agent portfolio valuation
Query protocol-level DeFi metrics (TVL, revenue, active addresses, transaction volume) across comparable protocols for agent research
Access fundraising and investor data (venture rounds, team info) for agent due diligence workflows on crypto projects
Retrieve token unlock schedules and vesting data for agent tracking of potential sell pressure on agent-held positions
Get qualitative asset profiles (tags, sector classification, description) for agent taxonomy and classification pipelines
not_for: Real-time tick-level price data — Messari updates hourly/daily; use CoinGecko, CoinMarketCap, or exchange APIs for real-time quotes
Non-crypto financial data — Messari covers crypto assets only
Developers who need a generous free tier — Messari's free tier is very limited; meaningful API access requires paid plans
best_when: You need institutional-quality, standardized crypto protocol metrics and research data for agent financial analysis, with consistent cross-protocol schemas.
avoid_when: You need real-time pricing, a generous free tier, or you're working with assets outside crypto.

auth.notes: API key passed as x-messari-api-key header. Some endpoints accessible without auth at lower rate limits. Paid tier key unlocks additional endpoints and higher rate limits.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free: basic asset data only, low rate limits (20 req/minute), no protocol metrics
pricing.paid_tiers: Basic $24.99/month, Pro $99.99/month (protocol metrics, fundraising data), Enterprise custom
pricing.notes: Most useful API data (protocol metrics, DeFi analytics, fundraising) requires Pro plan. Free tier covers basic price and market cap data only.

performance.rate_limits: Free: 20 req/min; Pro: 1,000 req/min; data updates are daily/hourly not real-time

agent_readiness.error_message_notes: Standard HTTP errors with JSON detail. Rate limit errors include Retry-After header. Error messages are generally descriptive.
agent_readiness.idempotency_notes: All endpoints are read-only GET requests and fully idempotent. Data updates on schedules (daily/hourly) so repeated calls return same data within update windows.
known_agent_gotchas: Asset slugs (e.g., 'bitcoin', 'ethereum') are used as identifiers, not tickers — agents must use Messari's slug convention, not CoinGecko or CoinMarketCap IDs
Protocol metrics (TVL, revenue, fees) only available on Pro plan — free tier agents only see basic market data
Data updates are daily or hourly for most metrics — not suitable for real-time price queries; use CoinGecko for live prices
Not all assets have protocol metrics — many long-tail assets only have market data; check asset availability before building pipelines
Messari's asset taxonomy and sector labels differ from other data providers — agents combining Messari with other sources must handle classification mismatches

security_score_components.security_notes: HTTPS enforced. Single API key with no scope granularity. All data is public market data — no user PII. Key rotation recommended periodically.
